Event: Underground Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/08/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: B12


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Atlant bow

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of dealing 75-90% damage to a group of enemies.

Once in a while, an archer starts a series of devastating shots: the first shot deals 300% more damage, a second shot with a chance of 50% deals 600% more damage than the fighter's normal attack. All subsequent shots have a 25% chance to deal 900% damage of a normal attack. Once the series is interrupted, the ability will begin to cooldown.

Requirements: 98-100
